title:
APAC Insider – Singapore Business Awards,
Best Optical Semiconductor Innovation 2026
subtitle: Best Optical Semiconductor Innovator
modalTitle:
APAC Insider – Singapore Business Awards 2026 -
Best Optical Semiconductor Innovator 2026
htmlContent: MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was named Best Optical Semiconductor Innovator 2026 at the Singapore Business Awards organised by APAC Insider, recognising the company's leadership in next-generation optical semiconductor technologies. The award highlights MetaOptics' pioneering work in metalens and advanced photonics innovation, enabling ultra-compact, high-performance optical systems for applications such as AI imaging, AR/VR devices, smart sensors, and next-generation consumer electronics. Selected through an independent research and evaluation process, this recognition positions MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd among Singapore's most innovative technology companies and underscores its growing role in shaping the future of optical semiconductor solutions within the global photonics and AI hardware ecosystem.

title:
Design AI & Tech Awards (DAITA) 2025 -
Winner
subtitle: Winner
htmlContent: MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was named a winner at the inaugural Design AI and Tech Awards (DAITA) 2025, a recognition that celebrates groundbreaking innovations at the intersection of artificial intelligence, advanced engineering, and product design. The award honours companies that demonstrate exceptional technological creativity, practical application of AI, and strong potential to shape future industries. MetaOptics received this recognition for its pioneering work in metalens and optical semiconductor technologies, enabling ultra-compact, high-performance optical systems for applications such as AI imaging, AR/VR devices, smart sensors, and next-generation consumer electronics. As a winner in the inaugural edition of the awards, MetaOptics is positioned among a select group of innovators setting the benchmark for AI-driven technology and design excellence in the global deep-tech ecosystem.

title: Asia Innovation Cup 2025 – Startup Innovation Award
subtitle: Startup Innovation Award
modalTitle: Asia Innovation Cup 2025 – Startup Innovation Award
htmlContent: MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was awarded the Startup Innovation Award at the 2025 Asia Innovation Cup, an international startup competition held during Taiwan's capital markets event and supported by institutions including the Taiwan Stock Exchange. The award recognises startups demonstrating exceptional technological innovation, market potential, and strategic impact across the Asia-Pacific region. MetaOptics received this recognition for its pioneering advancements in scalable metalens and optical semiconductor technologies, which enable ultra-compact imaging systems for applications such as AI sensing, AR/VR devices, and next-generation consumer electronics. Winning this award positions MetaOptics among the region's most promising deep-tech innovators and highlights the company's growing influence in the global photonics and AI hardware ecosystem.

title:
OCBC & The Business Times –
Emerging Enterprise 2025 Award – Finalist
subtitle: Emerging Enterprise 2025 Award
modalTitle:
OCBC & The Business Times –
Emerging Enterprise 2025 Award – Finalist
htmlContent: MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was selected as a Finalist in the 2025 Emerging Enterprise Awards, a prestigious regional business award jointly organised by The Business Times and OCBC Bank. The program recognises high-growth companies that demonstrate strong innovation, scalability, and international expansion potential across Asia. Being named a finalist places MetaOptics among a select group of top-performing emerging enterprises evaluated by industry leaders and business experts, highlighting the company's technological leadership in advanced optics and its strong commercial growth trajectory. This recognition underscores MetaOptics' credibility within the regional innovation ecosystem and signals to investors its potential to become a leading deep-tech company originating from Singapore.

title:
Qualcomm AI Program for Innovators –
APAC 2025 Shortlist
subtitle: APAC 2025 Shortlist
modalTitle:
QUALCOMM AI PROGRAM FOR INNOVATORS -
APAC 2025 SHORTLIST
htmlContent: MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was selected for the Shortlist of the Qualcomm AI Program for Innovators – APAC 2025, a highly competitive regional initiative led by Qualcomm to identify and support promising startups developing advanced artificial intelligence solutions. The program recognises companies demonstrating strong technical innovation, commercial potential, and strategic relevance to the evolving AI and edge-computing ecosystem. MetaOptics' inclusion on the shortlist highlights the significance of its next-generation metalens and optical semiconductor technologies in enabling AI-driven imaging and sensing applications across industries such as smart devices, AR/VR, autonomous systems, and advanced sensors. This recognition underscores MetaOptics' growing prominence within the Asia-Pacific deep-tech landscape and signals strong industry validation from a global leader in semiconductor and AI technologies.

title: SGX Securities – Listing Commemoration Award
subtitle: Listing Commemoration Award
htmlContent: MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd achieved a significant corporate milestone with its successful listing on the Singapore Exchange Catalist Board on 9th September 2025, the exchange's growth platform designed for high-potential and innovation-driven companies. The listing marks MetaOptics' transition from a private deep-tech startup to a publicly traded company, providing access to capital markets to accelerate research, product commercialization, and global expansion. Admission to the Catalist Board requires meeting strict regulatory, governance, and sponsor-supervised listing requirements, and signals strong confidence in the company's technology, business model, and growth trajectory. This milestone enhances MetaOptics' visibility among institutional investors and strategic partners while positioning the company to scale its advanced optical semiconductor and metalens technologies for next-generation AI imaging, AR/VR, and sensing applications worldwide.

title: A*STAR – T-Up Excellence Award 2024
subtitle: T-Up Excellence Award 2024
htmlContent: MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was recognised through the T-Up Excellence Award 2024, a prestigious recognition under the Technology for Enterprise Capability Upgrading (T-Up) initiative led by Agency for Science, Technology and Research. The award honours outstanding industry-research collaborations that successfully translate advanced scientific research into impactful commercial technologies. MetaOptics received this recognition for its successful partnership with A*STAR researchers in advancing next-generation metalens and optical semiconductor innovations, strengthening the company's R&D capabilities and accelerating the development of scalable photonics technologies. This award highlights MetaOptics' ability to bridge deep scientific research with real-world industrial applications, reinforcing its position as a leading deep-tech innovator within Singapore's national innovation ecosystem.

title: NVIDIA Inception Program – Startup Member
subtitle: Startup Member
htmlContent: MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was selected as a Startup Member of the NVIDIA Inception Program, a global initiative by NVIDIA that supports high-potential startups developing innovative solutions in artificial intelligence, accelerated computing, and intelligent systems. Membership in the program is granted to companies with strong technological capabilities and growth potential that align with NVIDIA's AI ecosystem. Through this recognition, MetaOptics gains access to advanced development resources, technical guidance, and global visibility within NVIDIA's network of technology partners and investors. This inclusion highlights the relevance of MetaOptics' next-generation metalens and optical semiconductor technologies in enabling AI-driven imaging, sensing, and edge-computing applications across emerging industries such as AR/VR, robotics, and autonomous systems.
